node.constraint: Initialize better-sqlite3 database 'shop.db'. Create a 'cart' table (columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, productId INTEGER, quantity INTEGER) if not exists. Support POST (inserts or increments product quantity), GET (returns cart items joined with products details), PUT (updates quantity for a specific productId), and DELETE (if query param productId is provided, delete that item, else clear the entire cart).

Create a professional shopping cart page at app/cart/page.tsx designed like Amazon's shopping cart. Display list of cart items with columns for product details, unit price, quantity selector (fetch PUT on change), and a 'Delete' button next to each item (fetch DELETE on click). On the right side, show a subtotal box with a yellow 'Proceed to checkout' link button pointing to '/checkout'. Link back to '/products' to continue shopping.
